text: I was in the shop from 6 a.m. to noon.
q: Was she at the shop in the afternoon?

text: I heard shouting, then a door slam.
q: Did he see the actual fight?

text: The car was parked two blocks away.
q: Was the car found near the scene?

text: The injury was at least three hours old.
q: Was the injury fresh?

text: The defendant bought a drink at 9:15 p.m.
q: Was the defendant in the store that night?

text: I did not see anyone enter after midnight.
q: Did he see someone enter after midnight?

text: No fingerprints matched the defendant.
q: Did the fingerprints match the defendant?

text: The lights were off when I walked past.
q: Were the lights on?

text: The package was delivered on Tuesday.
q: Was the package delivered on Tuesday?

text: The suspect refused to answer questions.
q: Did the suspect answer all questions?

text: I saw two people arguing by the gate.
q: Did she see two people arguing?

text: The phone was found under the sofa.
q: Was the phone found on the table?

text: Cause of death was blunt force trauma.
q: Was the cause a fall?

text: The contract was signed in blue ink.
q: Was the contract signed in blue ink?

text: The alarm triggered at 2:07 a.m.
q: Did the alarm trigger after 3 a.m.?

text: The defendant left before the toast.
q: Did the defendant stay for the toast?

text: The brake pads were worn down to the metal.
q: Were the brake pads in good condition?

text: I served dinner to exactly forty guests.
q: Did she serve dinner to the guests?

text: The safe was opened without any sign of forced entry.
q: Was there signs of forced entry on the safe?

text: I dropped the passenger at the airport by 7 p.m.
q: Did he drop the passenger at the airport?

text: The visitor signed in at 10:30 a.m. and left at noon.
q: Was the visitor still in the building at 1 p.m.?

text: I transferred five hundred thousand naira to that account.
q: Did he transfer money to that account?

text: The patient was discharged on Friday morning.
q: Was the patient discharged on Friday?

text: The fuse box had been tampered with before the fire.
q: Had the fuse box been tampered with?

text: The boy was absent from class all week.
q: Was the boy present in class that week?

text: We recovered the weapon from the accused's vehicle.
q: Was the weapon recovered from the accused's vehicle?

text: The gentleman paid with a cracked hundred-naira note.
q: Did the gentleman pay with cash?

text: The flowers were delivered before the ceremony started.
q: Were the flowers delivered after the ceremony?

text: The blood sample was collected at 4 a.m.
q: Was the blood sample collected in the morning?

text: I saw a woman in a red wrapper leaving the compound.
q: Did he see a man leaving the compound?

text: The ledger showed a shortfall of two million naira.
q: Did the ledger show a shortfall?

text: I was at the shrine from dusk until dawn.
q: Was he at the shrine during the night?

text: The tenant had not paid rent for three months.
q: Had the tenant paid rent recently?

text: The CCTV footage was erased before we arrived.
q: Was the CCTV footage intact when police arrived?

text: I took pictures of the wedding from start to finish.
q: Did he photograph the entire wedding?

text: The prescription was filled twice in one week.
q: Was the prescription filled more than once?

text: The wall was already cracked before I started work.
q: Did he cause the crack in the wall?

text: I found the ring in the wastebasket, not the sink.
q: Was the ring found in the sink?

text: The checkpoint was unmanned between 1 and 3 a.m.
q: Was the checkpoint manned all night?

text: I recorded the entire speech on my phone.
q: Did she record the speech?
